headline: A Look At Progressive (PGR) Valuation After Solid Q1 2026 Results And Capital Return Updates
summary: What triggered the latest focus on Progressive stock? Progressive (PGR) is back in focus after reporting solid fiscal Q1 2026 results, outlining revenue and net premiums written growth, and pairing that with a CFO transition, renewed buyback authorization, and a declared dividend. See our latest analysis for Progressive.
